highlights.description: Composable omniskill architecture for modular, reusable MCP skills
Vault-backed credentials via omnitoken (1Password, Bitwarden, file, env)
Cobra CLI with subcommands and direct tool invocation

breaking.description: CLI now uses cobra with `--flag` style instead of `-flag`

upgradeGuide.description: Update CLI flag syntax from `-flag` to `--flag`

added.description: Composable Confluence skill using omniskill framework
Cobra-based CLI with subcommands (serve, get-page, search-pages, etc.)
Direct CLI tool invocation for testing and scripting

changed.description: Server now uses omniskill runtime instead of custom JSON-RPC handler

documentation.description: Add getting started guides (installation, setup, quickstart)
Add configuration documentation (credentials, environment, Claude Desktop)
Update README for vault-backed credentials and new module path

highlights.description: Initial release with MCP tools for safe Confluence page editing
Structured content blocks for creating and reading pages
Lossless XHTML round-trip editing for complex pages

added.description: `confluence_read_page` tool for reading pages as structured content blocks
`confluence_read_page_xhtml` tool for reading pages as raw Storage Format XHTML
`confluence_update_page` tool for updating pages with structured content blocks
`confluence_update_page_xhtml` tool for updating pages with raw XHTML
`confluence_create_page` tool for creating new pages with structured blocks
`confluence_create_table` tool for creating table blocks from structured data
`confluence_delete_page` tool for deleting pages by ID
`confluence_search_pages` tool for searching pages using CQL
Structured block types: Paragraph, Heading, Table, BulletList, NumberedList, Macro, CodeBlock, HorizontalRule
Storage package with Parse, Render, and Validate functions
HTML entity support for Storage Format XHTML
Confluence REST API client with basic authentication
